I am writing this message while feeling extremely upset and disappointed after my visit today. What happened with one of the doctors at your hospital was completely unacceptable. There was absolutely no respect, no professionalism, and no sense of empathy. The way she spoke to me was rude and demeaning — I actually left her office in tears because of her behavior.

To make things worse, I had previously experienced racism in the emergency department just because I don’t speak Kurdish. The staff there treated me with zero respect, and their attitude was humiliating.

What’s the point of having an “online appointment system” if it’s just a fancy decoration? I book, I show up on time and then I sit there like I’m in a medieval waiting hall until everyone else goes first. Call it what it really is a lottery with chairs.
And the receptionists? Most of them act like communication is rocket science. No basic social skills, no respect for patients, and plenty of attitude. If your front desk can’t even manage a hello without looking annoyed, maybe the problem isn’t the patients it’s your staff.

I had stayed at this hotel for seven days and i have mixed feelings about it.
First, the rooms or atleast the ones i have seen were quite spacious and very clean i really admire their cleaning staff.
Second, the service and by that i mean the reception and the maintenance team and also the restaurant staff, they are mid at best, there were couple of accidents that proved their staff need to understand that this is a five star hotel and their behavior did not reflect that at all.
Lastly, the food to be more specific their restaurant and the breakfast buffet, to put it in two clear words ( food poisoning)
I and at least 10 other people were poisoned by the hotel food the breakfast buffet was recycled every day and by the third day of our accommodation our stomachs could not take it anymore and we had multiple people suffering from stomach pain vomiting and other severe symptoms after that none of us touched their food.
If they worked on some of their weaknesses like the service, food and also the rooms need periodic maintenance since i and two of my friends changed our rooms due to issues with the ac or leaking problems or even broken balcony doors this hotel would be an amazing place especially that it's location is perfect.
I want to add something which is the whole male and female mixed spa is absolutely disgusting and so not suitable for our community i wish they separate the space and the time which the spa is used.

Tucked away in the heart of the city, Game Center stands as a veritable paradise for gamers of all stripes. From casual enthusiasts to hardcore aficionados, this gaming haven offers an expansive array of features and experiences that are sure to delight and captivate.

Upon entering Game Center, one is immediately struck by the bustling atmosphere and vibrant energy. Rows upon rows of state-of-the-art gaming setups beckon, each boasting a dazzling array of consoles, PCs, and peripherals designed to cater to every gaming whim.

What sets Game Center apart is its unparalleled selection of games. Whether you're a fan of heart-pounding shooters, immersive RPGs, or adrenaline-fueled racing games, you'll find no shortage of options to satisfy your gaming cravings. From beloved classics to the latest releases, Game Center ensures that players have access to an ever-expanding library of titles to explore and enjoy.

Of all the offerings at Game Center, perhaps the most exciting is the immersive car racing experience. Equipped with specially designed car seats, steering wheels, and gears, players can dive headfirst into the adrenaline-pumping world of high-speed racing like never before. The sensation of gripping the wheel and feeling the rumble of the engine beneath you is truly unparalleled, making for an unforgettable gaming experience that will leave you breathless and eager for more.

In addition to its impressive selection of games, Game Center also boasts top-of-the-line gaming equipment, including high-performance PCs, cutting-edge consoles, and premium gaming accessories. Whether you prefer the precision of a mouse and keyboard or the familiarity of a console controller, Game Center has everything you need to elevate your gaming experience to new heights.

Moreover, Game Center's knowledgeable staff members are always on hand to provide expert guidance and assistance. Whether you're a seasoned gamer looking for your next challenge or a newcomer eager to dive into the world of gaming, you'll find the support and encouragement you need to make the most of your time at Game Center.

Overall, Game Center stands as a beacon of excitement and entertainment in the world of gaming, offering a diverse selection of features, games, and experiences that cater to every taste and preference. If you're ready to embark on a gaming adventure like no other, look no further than Game Center.

reviewsSample.text: I brought my Iphone 14 plus, it’s was restarting. After leaving it for 3 days, the receptionist told me that your Iphone can’t be fixed and the only thing you can do it is to sell it as spare parts. I took it outside and it was fixed. I imagine what if i took your word and sold my phone as spare parts for 10 percent of its price? How many people have made line this? You’re the worst and unreliable place!

Terrible Service & Questionable Product Quality – Beware!

I purchased an iPhone 13 from iCenter (Apple Authorized) in Sulaymaniyah with a two-year warranty, expecting a hassle-free experience. However, within just one month, I had to visit their store 5 to 8 times due to issues with the phone.

Instead of providing a quick resolution, they kept my phone for 6 days in the first month. Now, they are saying it will take another two weeks! This kind of service is completely unacceptable, especially for a brand-new phone. I have no idea how a new iPhone can develop faults so quickly, which raises serious concerns about the authenticity of the products they are selling.

I strongly suspect that iCenter is selling refurbished phones in Sulaymaniyah and possibly across Iraq, while claiming they are brand-new. Apple customers deserve genuine products and professional service, but iCenter is failing at both.

I would not recommend buying from iCenter unless they improve their customer service and ensure they are selling authentic, brand-new Apple products. Apple should investigate their practices immediately.

I'm really frustrated with their delivery system. It seems like they don't bother to contact you or even read and answer your messages correctly. It's also annoying that they don't have an account-based delivery system, so I can't track my purchases. On the bright side, when I went to the showroom, their clerk was actually really respectful and understandable. So I guess the whole experience wasn't completely terrible. At least I'm happy with the price and what I bought.

I feel so disappointed from thier way of selling non original accessories by original.They sold me the cam cover by 30000 iq isn’t take a month just broken fro

Excellent iPhone store with genuine products only. The staff are professional, friendly, and very helpful. Smooth and trustworthy experience. Highly recommended.

M Center needs to stop acting like we’re all stupid, because there is no way an iPhone really costs $1,259 — that’s way too cheap, and it’s obviously fake. They’re trying to trick people into thinking they’re getting some crazy deal, when in reality, it’s probably a refurbished or fake iPhone, or they’re cutting corners somewhere. Apple products don’t magically drop hundreds of dollars below the official price just because M Center says so. If they were actually selling real, brand-new iPhones at that price, they’d be sold out in five minutes and everyone would be buying from them, but that’s not what’s happening. This is just another way for them to bait people in, make them think they’re saving money, and then hand them something that isn’t what they paid for. It’s shady, it’s dishonest, and it shows they don’t care about their customers — they just want to pull people in with fake “deals.” No one should trust that price for a second, because if it sounds too good to be true, it usually is, and M Center is the perfect example of that.

reviewsSample.text:
Historical Photography and Camera store on Piramerd Street.

You're one stop shop for anything camera related, especially in the vintage field. This is one of the few places in the city, and the country that still sells photographic film of 120 mm and 35 mm.

You can find brand new Kodak gold 200 film, or even older films and many other film cameras. There's 120 format cameras, there's vintage ones, and there's also normal 35mm cameras. The owner, Kak Jamal is very nice and accommodating and a figure of the local community.

You can also find many compact digikam and rare items that you wouldn't find anywhere else.

You can also take the simple passport photo here, for the purpose of documents, in any size and format you want.

You can also just come in to talk with the owner which loves to interact and share his stories of his many years and experiences and photography and national service.
